hero.headline: Manual work,
hero.description: Automations, AI, system integrations, and payment reconciliation — for teams that have outgrown the spreadsheet.
hero.proof: KrakenBay reclaimed 30+ hours a week — billing and scheduling, automated.
hero.offerNote: Free 20-min audit — keep the findings whether you hire us or not.
hero.trust: Gyms · Clinics · Real estate · Studios — Guadalajara & beyond

panel.title: Operations

tasks.label: CRM and books kept in sync

panel.metricLabel: tasks handled today, untouched by hand

problemSolution.problemBody: Chasing payments across three apps. Re-keying the same data into systems that should talk to each other. Following up by hand. Reading documents one by one. Reconciling at midnight in a spreadsheet. Every hour on operational busywork is an hour not spent growing the business.
problemSolution.solutionHeadline: Days of manual work, down to minutes.
problemSolution.solutionBody: Scheduling, follow-ups, billing, document intake, data entry, reconciliation — we connect your tools and automate the repetitive work so it runs without you. Tavros went from three-day reconciliations to twelve minutes; the same engine handles the rest.

services.headline: What we take off your plate.
services.description: Every service comes with receipts: real results from real clients, not numbers from a pitch deck.

items.name: Custom Automations
items.description: Workflows that run while you sleep. We remove the repetitive work from your operations: scheduling, follow-ups, billing, and the rest.
items.proof: KrakenBay saves 30+ hours/week on scheduling and billing alone.

items.name: AI & Intelligent Systems
items.description: We put AI where it actually pays off: reading documents, drafting replies, classifying and routing requests, and answering questions from your own data — with custom agents that handle the judgment calls.
items.proof: Document intake that took an afternoon now clears itself in minutes.

items.name: System Integrations
items.description: Your tools should talk to each other. We connect CRM to calendar, payments to accounting, and sales to fulfillment, so data stops falling through the cracks.
items.proof: Inmovilia's sales-to-construction handoff went from days to instant.

items.name: Payment Reconciliation
items.description: Stop reconciling transactions by hand. We automate the matching and verification of every payment across terminals, banks, and platforms.
items.proof: Tavros cut billing cycles by 3x, with no more chasing late renewals.

items.name: Digital Presence
items.description: Landing pages, client portals, and portfolio sites built to convert. If your online presence doesn't match the quality of your work, we fix that too.
items.proof: Eternus went from a mismatched page to a portfolio that closes clients.

items.name: Process Optimization
items.description: We audit, redesign, and implement workflows that cut bottlenecks and operational costs, in ways you can measure.
items.proof: Most clients recover the project's cost within the first 60 days.

clients.headline: In their words.
clients.sectionSub: Four businesses, four different stacks, one outcome: hours back and nothing slipping through the cracks.

items.quote: The cash floating around, the terminal, tickets, bank apps. I needed all of that to know my in-out expenses. I don't have any clue how they did all of that automatically.
The Æther team helped me reduce what usually took me weeks in reconciliation each month. Now I focus on what I care about: bringing more clients to my business.
I didn't even have a web page! I contacted them and in a couple of hours I was able to send the link to my investors. They saved me.
They helped me actually have a portfolio for my work. My old landing page wasn't aligned to what I do. Now both match!

process.headline: From audit to running system.
process.description: Three weeks to first automation, not a six-month rollout. Every engagement runs the same three steps.
deliverables: You get: a build plan + fixed quote

steps.title: Discover
steps.description: We audit your current workflows end-to-end. Every manual step, every bottleneck, every dollar leaking through the cracks, mapped and quantified.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: We architect automations tailored to your stack, built around how your business actually runs.

steps.title: Deploy
steps.description: We launch, monitor, and iterate. Your automations run 24/7 while we handle maintenance, optimization, and whatever breaks at 3 AM.

checkFit.headline: Who we work with.
checkFit.description: We go deep with a handful of clients at a time — so we're honest about the fit, both ways.
checkFit.soundLikeYou: If the left column is you, we should talk.
audiences: You're scaling fast with a team too small for the ops load
You run a business (gym, clinic, real estate) buried in admin
Your time is worth more than another hour of data entry
Reconciliation still lives in a spreadsheet at midnight
notAudiences: You're shopping for the cheapest quote, not the best system
You want a tool to run yourself, not a partner who owns it
You're not ready to change how the work actually gets done
You need a one-off favor, not an ongoing relationship

contact.headline: Tell us where the hours go.
contact.description: Book the free 20-minute audit: we map where your week leaks hours — and what it's costing you. You keep that map whether you hire us or not. If there's nothing worth automating, we'll tell you straight. No pitch.
contact.messagePlaceholder: A few lines on what's manual, what's breaking, or where your week disappears.
contact.responseNote: We reply within one business day.
steps: Free 20-minute audit: we map where your hours and money leak.
You keep the findings and get a fixed quote. No pitch if it's not worth it.
assurances: NDA on day one — we work inside your own accounts.
First automation live in 2 to 3 weeks.
Keep the audit findings whether you hire us or not.
contact.success: Thank you. We'll reply within one business day.
contact.error: Something went wrong and your message didn't send. Email us instead and we'll take it from there.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.messageRequired: Please tell us what's slowing you down.
validation.messageShort: A little more detail helps — at least 10 characters.

integrations.headline: We connect the tools you already pay for.
integrations.subcopy: Stripe to your bank, your calendar to your CRM, your POS to your books. If it has an API or a webhook, we automate it.

faq.headline: Questions, answered.
faq.subhead: The things founders ask us before booking the audit.

items.a: First automation live within 2-3 weeks of kickoff. Most engagements deliver measurable hours saved inside 30 days, not the 6-month rollouts you'd get from a traditional agency.

Engagements start around $4,500 and scale with scope. Most clients recover the cost in the first 60 days through reclaimed hours and reduced billing leakage. We share a fixed quote after the free audit, with no hourly games.

items.q: Will this work with our current tools?
items.a: Almost certainly. We connect Stripe, HubSpot, Notion, Airtable, QuickBooks, Slack, Google Workspace, n8n, Zapier, Make, and 100+ others. If your stack has an API or a webhook, we can automate it.

We monitor every workflow we ship. If something fails at 3 AM, we get paged, not you. Maintenance and small iterations are included in the first 90 days; after that, ongoing support is a flat monthly retainer.
No. We replace the work nobody on your team should be doing. Your people get to focus on customers, growth, and judgment calls, the things software can't do.

Yes. We work inside your accounts (or deploy to your infrastructure), never store credentials in plaintext, and sign an NDA on day one. We can also work under your existing security and compliance requirements.

footer.tagline: An automation studio for businesses that have outgrown manual work. Based in Guadalajara, working with teams everywhere.
